fields.title: Longest Common Subsequence
fields.statement: Given two strings text1 and text2, return the length of their longest common subsequence.

fields.title: Dijkstra? (Codeforces 20C)
fields.statement: Find the shortest path from vertex 1 to vertex n in a weighted graph.

fields.title: Number of Islands
fields.statement: Given an m x n 2D binary grid, return the number of islands.

fields.title: Container With Most Water
fields.statement: Find two lines that together with the x-axis form a container holding the most water.
fields.code_submitted: // two pointer approach, off by one bug on shrink condition

fields.title: Aggressive Cows (CodeChef AGGRCOW)
fields.statement: Place C cows into stalls to maximize the minimum distance between any two cows.

fields.title: 0/1 Knapsack
fields.statement: Given weights and values of n items, put items in a knapsack of capacity W to maximize value.

fields.title: Word Break
fields.statement: Given a string s and a dictionary of strings wordDict, return true if s can be segmented into a space-separated sequence of dictionary words.

fields.title: Kruskal's MST (Codeforces 1245D)
fields.statement: Build a minimum spanning tree with a twist on edge selection order.

fields.recognition_trigger: Two strings/arrays being compared, asked for longest/shortest shared subsequence or edit distance.
fields.core_insight: dp[i][j] represents the best answer using the first i and j elements of each sequence; transitions compare text1[i-1] vs text2[j-1].
fields.common_edge_cases: Empty string inputs; all-matching or all-mismatching sequences; off-by-one indexing into the dp table.

fields.recognition_trigger: Weighted graph, non-negative edge weights, need shortest path from a single source.
fields.core_insight: Greedily relax edges from the minimum-distance unvisited node using a min-heap priority queue.
fields.common_edge_cases: Disconnected graph nodes; duplicate edges with different weights; overflow on large distance sums.

fields.recognition_trigger: Asked to maximize a minimum (or minimize a maximum) and the feasibility of a candidate answer can be checked in O(n) or O(n log n).
fields.core_insight: Binary search over the possible answer values, using a greedy feasibility check as the predicate.
fields.common_edge_cases: Search boundaries too tight/loose; off-by-one on final answer; feasibility check not monotonic if implemented incorrectly.

fields.recognition_trigger: Items with weight/value, capacity constraint, each item used at most once.
fields.core_insight: dp[w] = max value achievable with capacity w, iterating items outer loop and capacity inner loop in reverse to avoid reuse.
fields.common_edge_cases: Iterating capacity forward by mistake (allows reuse); capacity of 0; item weight exceeding capacity.

fields.bug_found: Loop terminated one iteration early, missing the optimal pair at the boundary.
fields.root_cause: Used < instead of <= in the while loop condition for the two-pointer shrink step.
fields.lesson_learned: Always trace through the boundary case (left == right - 1) by hand before submitting two-pointer solutions.

fields.bug_found: Exponential blowup from re-solving overlapping subproblems.
fields.root_cause: Forgot to memoize the recursive wordBreak(s, start) calls.
fields.lesson_learned: Whenever recursion branches on multiple choices over an index, check for overlapping subproblems and add memoization by default.
